subject: HDFCBANK: NIM trough visible in 1QFY27; Buy, PT ₹2,050
bodyText: We reiterate Buy on HDFCBANK with a 12-month price target of ₹2,050 (prior PT ₹1,950). The NIM trough is now clearly in view for 1QFY27 and the loan-to-deposit ratio is tracking towards ~100% by FY27 exit. Full note attached.
